response.justification: This candidate is a fundamental mismatch for the role. While they demonstrate strong software engineering fundamentals and communication abilities, they lack the mandatory C++ expertise (6 months vs. 5-10 years required), have no Windows platform development experience (resume emphasizes Linux), lack SQL Server/Oracle proficiency, and—critically—have zero capital markets or fixed income domain knowledge. Their entire career is in web development, GIS, and general software engineering, not financial services or systems programming.
strengths: Excellent communication and mentoring abilities demonstrated through workshops, public talks, and open-source contributions
Strong software engineering fundamentals with proven TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship practices
Proven ability to learn diverse technology stacks and adapt across multiple domains and programming languages
concerns: Severely insufficient C++ experience (~6 months professional vs. 5-10 years required) with emphasis on Linux, not Windows platforms
Complete absence of capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, or financial services domain knowledge or experience
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle expertise; experience centers on web technologies and NoSQL databases like MongoDB
